title: About Me
paragraphs: Hi, I'm Michael, a frontend developer behind MC Codes.
I specialize in building modern, responsive web applications using Angular, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
My focus is clean architecture, scalable frontend systems, and user experiences that perform across all devices.
I help startups, agencies, and businesses turn designs into fast, reliable, and maintainable web applications.
highlight: My goal is simple: clean code, great UI, and reliable performance.
